rule.name: color soft NZ
rule.message: In New Zealand English, "colour" is often preferred.

rule.name: favorite soft NZ
rule.message: In New Zealand English, "favourite" is often preferred.

rule.name: center soft NZ
rule.message: In New Zealand English, "centre" is often preferred.

rule.name: organize soft NZ
rule.message: In New Zealand English, "organise" is often preferred.

rule.name: realize soft NZ
rule.message: In New Zealand English, "realise" is often preferred.

rule.name: traveled soft NZ
rule.message: In New Zealand English, "travelled" is often preferred.

rule.name: canceled soft NZ
rule.message: In New Zealand English, "cancelled" is often preferred.

rule.name: tire soft NZ
rule.message: In New Zealand English, "tyre" is preferred for vehicle wheels.
